title: XPS to PDF
metaDescription: Convert XPS documents to PDF format. High-fidelity conversion preserving layout and graphics.
description:
XPS to PDF converts Microsoft XPS (XML Paper Specification) documents into PDF format while preserving the original layout, text, and vector graphics.

XPS is a fixed-document format similar to PDF. This tool provides high-fidelity conversion using native XPS parsing, ensuring accurate reproduction of your documents.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload XPS File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .xps file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will parse and convert the XPS document.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Format Conversion
useCases.description: Convert XPS documents to more widely supported PDF format.

useCases.title: Document Sharing
useCases.description: Share XPS documents with users who don't have XPS viewers.

useCases.title: Archive Migration
useCases.description: Migrate XPS archives to PDF format for better compatibility.

faq.question: What is XPS format?
faq.answer: XPS (XML Paper Specification) is Microsoft's fixed-document format, similar to PDF. It's commonly used for Windows printing.

faq.question: Is the conversion lossless?
faq.answer: Yes, the conversion preserves text, graphics, and layout with high fidelity.

faq.question: Are multi-page XPS files supported?
faq.answer: Yes, all pages in the XPS document are converted to the PDF.
